channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. It took 17 years but Minecraft players can finally rest on cushions  Windows Central
  5. Minecraft Cushions Don't Kill Performance, Test Shows  games.gg

item.title: Seven Games Are Confirmed For Xbox Game Pass This Week (July 13-17) - Pure Xbox
item.description:
1. Seven Games Are Confirmed For Xbox Game Pass This Week (July 13-17)  Pure Xbox
  2. Coming to XBOX Game Pass: Gears of War: Reloaded, The Planet Crafter, Palworld 1.0, and More  XBOX Wire
  3. These 40+ Games Are Coming To Xbox Next Week (July 13-17)  Pure Xbox
  4. Xbox Game Pass July 2026 Lineup Announced  IGN
  5. Next Week on XBOX: New Games for July 13 to 17  XBOX Wire
